history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a man
Angel kamera/framing: low angle shot, medium close-up from the chest up, captured as a reflection in a large, floor-standing mirror, the camera is positioned slightly below the subject's eye level, looking upwards towards his face and torso, with the top edge of the mirror frame cutting into the top of the image, creating a slightly cropped effect, the framing emphasizes the subject's physique and the surrounding room as seen in the reflection, with the edges of the mirror frame visible on the left and right sides.
Outfit: The subject is wearing black, loose-fitting athletic shorts, made of a matte fabric that appears to be cotton or a similar soft material, with a dark waistband visible, he is shirtless, his skin glistening with sweat, suggesting he has recently exercised, a thin, dark woven bracelet is visible on his left wrist.
pose: The man is flexing his right bicep with his arm bent at the elbow and raised, his fist clenched, his head is tilted back, looking upwards towards a light source, his mouth is slightly open as if catching a drop of water or exhaling, his left hand is holding the waistband of his shorts, pulling them down slightly, creating a subtle fold in the fabric, his body is slightly angled, showcasing his chest and abdominal muscles, his expression is one of exertion and perhaps a moment of relief or satisfaction.
enviroment: The background is a room with a light blue wall, a bed with patterned bedding is visible in the reflection, featuring a repeating geometric design of teal, white, and dark blue waves or abstract shapes, a pillow with a cartoon character, possibly Spongebob Squarepants, is resting on the bed, a patterned curtain with a dark floral or leaf motif hangs on the right side of the room, adding a domestic touch, the overall environment appears to be a bedroom or a personal living space, suggesting an informal setting.
lighting: The primary light source appears to be a bright, direct light from above, possibly a ceiling light or sunlight, casting a strong glare and lens flare effect in the reflection, the light illuminates the subject from the front and slightly from above, highlighting the sweat on his skin and creating subtle shadows that define his musculature, the ambient light in the room is soft, contributing to the overall bright but slightly diffused atmosphere, reflections of the light source are prominent on the mirror's surface and the subject's wet skin.
Final style: Highly detailed, high resolution, handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect, the image should precisely mimic the framing and composition of the original reference, including the visible mirror frame and the specific angles of the reflection.
